The Vercel Project's Root Directory is set to `apps/web` in the Dashboard — every build cd's there before reading framework + build commands. If a teammate ever re-runs `vercel git connect` and Root Directory resets, the project settings page is the source of truth: https://vercel.com/miguel-sambricio-s-projects/hotelvalora/settings
